creator: teru-sama@riseup.net
text:
>Were you thinking of writing an rc script for this to run it as a daemon?

Yes. I have already written the rc file.

>Also, there is a note in README that is a little unnerving..

I modified the source code for fingerd.c so now it uses a custom asprintf() function instead of snprintf() and strncpy(). And also added setuid() and setgid() so the daemon only uses privileges to bind to port 79.
